data_sources.canonical_baseline: SV2.0.2 DB-imported Money Flow v1.2 evidence packs

gap_matrix.current_v1_2_behavior: EMA5 > EMA10 > SMA20 stack, RSI sleeve, MACD constructive gate, and pullback/continuation quality are primary.
gap_matrix.evidence_implication: MF-ORIG-EV1 must compare a 1d-first stage/crossover system against v1.2, not overwrite v1.2.
gap_matrix.gap_or_drift: Current v1.2 is Money Flow-inspired but not source-faithful; it treats RSI/MACD as entry gates rather than secondary warning/confirmation context.

gap_matrix.current_v1_2_behavior: RSI sleeve floors/ceilings act as entry eligibility gates and trim thresholds.
gap_matrix.evidence_implication: Original hypotheses should not reject entries solely because RSI is below a v1.2 sleeve floor.
gap_matrix.gap_or_drift: RSI has moved from warning context to entry filter.
gap_matrix.source_faithful_reconstruction: Only block extreme-overbought entries and use RSI > 70 as warning/trim context.

gap_matrix.current_v1_2_behavior: MA break plus MACD rollover can close/reduce under sleeve-specific logic.
gap_matrix.evidence_implication: Original replay must separate full exits from profit-warning trims.
gap_matrix.gap_or_drift: Current exits can be more MACD-sensitive than the source hierarchy.
gap_matrix.original_pdf_rule: Full exit is 5 EMA crossing/closing below 20 SMA or price close below 20 SMA.
gap_matrix.source_faithful_reconstruction: Full exits on EMA5/SMA20 bear cross or price below SMA20; MACD bearish while profitable trims.

gap_matrix.current_v1_2_behavior: Canonical evidence primarily uses position_notional_pct dynamic equity and no source-structure stop model.
gap_matrix.evidence_implication: MF-ORIG-EV1 should test risk-budget sizing and prior support/pivot stops explicitly.
gap_matrix.gap_or_drift: Current evidence does not model source-style structure stops or 1% risk sizing.
gap_matrix.original_pdf_rule: Stops are placed around support/resistance or pivots and risk is sized from stop distance.
gap_matrix.source_faithful_reconstruction: Risk 1% of realized equity, cap notional at current equity, and use prior support low/pivot proxy.

entry: MACD bullish crossover or histogram improving
profit_management: MACD bearish crossover while profitable trims 25%
hypothesis_definitions.sizing: risk_budget=current_realized_equity*1%; size=risk_budget/(entry-stop); notional capped at current equity

entry: MACD not strongly bearish or improving
blocked unless original Stage 2 is active

source_document.author: Gerald Peters
source_document.limitation: The PDF file was not present in the repository or common local Downloads/Documents search paths during MF-ORIG-EV1, so source extraction is limited to the prompt-supplied source summary.
source_document.title: The Money Flow Trading System

source_rule_extraction.evidence_translation: Classify stages deterministically from prior/current candles using close versus SMA20, EMA5/SMA20 crosses, whipsaw/range behavior, RSI/MACD warnings, and prior stage state.
source_rule_extraction.source_rule: Stage 1 accumulation/sideways is whipsaw risk; Stage 2 markup is the primary long regime; Stage 3 distribution warns of topping; Stage 4 markdown is decline.

source_rule_extraction.evidence_translation: Primary entries require close above SMA20 plus EMA5 crossing above SMA20 or a pullback/reclaim within Stage 2. Full exits use EMA5 cross below SMA20 or price close below SMA20.
source_rule_extraction.source_rule: 5 EMA / 20 SMA crossover is the basic buy/sell signal; 10 EMA is trend/alignment context; 20 SMA is the foundation/stage line; 50/200 SMA are respected context.

source_rule_extraction.evidence_translation: TSI is deferred; MACD 12/26/9 is used as the accepted substitute. Bullish crossover or improving histogram confirms entries; bearish crossover while profitable trims 25%.
source_rule_extraction.source_rule: TSI or MACD confirms trend and warns when profitable positions weaken.

source_rule_extraction.evidence_translation: RSI above 70 records profit warnings; when paired with bearish MACD while profitable, one 25% trim is applied. RSI high alone does not close the trade.
source_rule_extraction.source_rule: RSI > 70 is profit-taking/warning context, not necessarily a full exit.

source_rule_extraction.evidence_translation: Use prior completed-candle support/pivot proxy: recent support low from the prior 10 candles, with optional confirmed pivot low when available before entry.
source_rule_extraction.source_rule: Stops belong near logical support/resistance or pivots, not arbitrary fixed percent.

source_rule_extraction.evidence_translation: Risk budget is 1% of current realized equity. Size is risk budget divided by entry-stop distance with 100% equity notional cap.
source_rule_extraction.source_rule: Position sizing is based on defined risk, ideally 1% or less of current account equity per trade.

source_rule_extraction.evidence_translation: Treat 1d as primary, 4h as secondary context, 1h as exploratory timing, and exclude 15m from original-source conclusions.
source_rule_extraction.source_rule: The book uses daily charts while describing the system as fractal.
